name: clarieye-monorepo
description: Unified repository for the ClariEye Retinal Diagnostic Platform

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run prisma:push
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:ml"
scripts.start: npm run setup && npm run dev
